mapper.sql: SELECT o.*, c.full_name AS customer_name, p.full_name AS photographer_name, l.title AS listing_title, CAST(ts.slot_date AS CHAR) AS slot_date, CONCAT(ts.start_time, ' - ', ts.end_time) AS slot_time FROM orders o JOIN users c ON o.customer_id = c.id JOIN users p ON o.photographer_id = p.id JOIN listings l ON o.listing_id = l.id JOIN time_slots ts ON o.time_slot_id = ts.id
mapper.select: WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
WHERE o.photographer_id = #{photographerId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
WHERE o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_number, customer_id, photographer_id, listing_id, time_slot_id, status, total_price, paid_amount, payment_reference, cancel_reason, refund_amount, reschedule_from_id, address_id, notes, delivery_mode, payment_deadline) VALUES (#{orderNumber}, #{customerId}, #{photographerId}, #{listingId}, #{timeSlotId}, #{status}, #{totalPrice}, #{paidAmount}, #{paymentReference}, #{cancelReason}, #{refundAmount}, #{rescheduleFromId}, #{addressId}, #{notes}, #{deliveryMode}, #{paymentDeadline})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND status = 'COMPLETED'
